name: Grand Junction (Middle)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions may be in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 15
Max Temp > 80, Min Rh < 15, 1000hr Fuels < 12, Max RH < 55
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The Middle Elevation Fire Danger Rating Area uses the folMiddleing Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Y (Timber) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
51506: Crown, 51607: Gypsum, 52409: Dominguez/Jacks Canyon
